legal.title: Privacy policy and general terms of use of the RoxShield platform by Rostel High-Tech.
legal.data_collection_en: RoxShield collects data necessary for the operation of the platform: name, email, professional role, training results, and phishing simulation responses. All data is collected with the explicit consent of the client organization.
legal.data_collection_fr: RoxShield collects data necessary for the operation of the platform: name, email, professional role, training results, and phishing simulation responses. All data is collected with the explicit consent of the client organization.
legal.data_usage: The collected data is used exclusively to provide cybersecurity training, generate risk reports, and improve the user experience.
legal.data_security: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Access is controlled by strict permissions.
legal.data_retention_en: Training data is retained for the duration of the client contract plus 12 months. Upon request, all data can be exported or permanently deleted.
legal.data_retention_fr: Training data is retained for the duration of the client contract plus 12 months. Upon request, all data can be exported or permanently deleted.
legal.platform_desc: RoxShield is a SaaS platform for human cybersecurity training, phishing simulation, and risk scoring. The platform is operated by Rostel High-Tech.
legal.usage_terms: The platform must be used solely for legitimate cybersecurity training purposes within your organization. Simulated phishing must only target employees informed of the program.
legal.availability: We aim for 99.9% availability. Scheduled maintenance windows are communicated 48 hours in advance.
legal.intellectual_property: All content, designs, and algorithms within RoxShield are the property of Rostel High-Tech. Client data remains the property of the client organization.
legal.governing_law: These terms are governed by Senegalese law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of Dakar, Senegal.
